data.title: AWS Cloud Security
data.description: Security frameworks built within AWS provide baseline protection for Amazon's infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Identity and Access Management, Virtual Private Cloud.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Robust systems in place to protect against denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield, AWS WAF for filtering and protection.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Regular scanning for vulnerabilities within applications and servers.
data.technical_spec: Use of AWS Inspector and third-party tools for continuous scanning.

data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Data integrity and confidentiality maintained through strong encryption practices.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, KMS for data at rest encryption.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Strict access management to limit data and system exposure.
